title: passiflora alata var. latifolia
intro: Passiflora alata var. latifolia, also known as the passion flower with wings, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Passifloraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-anxiety effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Passiflora alata var. latifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. This plant can be used to prepare teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to calm the nervous system and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness.
